verbatim_text: And now if you just do the old-fashioned practice tests during training, well, it's practicing a different skill. Doing take-home tests is really its own skill. And during training, we will do the analogy of practice take-home tests. And in machine learning, the term for this is called learning to learn, or meta-learning. And this is an important detail that we need to pay attention to at training time. After you deal with this detail, you see that this method also is left in this panel. And this is the first method that I've seen with this sort of scale and behavior. Question, please. So when you're doing this test time training, what is the sort of loss function you're backpropagating on? Just next-token prediction. And I have another sort of follow-up. Maybe it's sort of a test time training. But I guess one difference between when you're doing this test time training versus sort of standard training is that the data is no longer IID. Yes.
